subcodes.first_line: As to the reply concerning Mrs. John Pratt: Before the revelation of the Most Holy Book, in accordance with the former Dispensation, Bahá'u'lláh had [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و امّا جواب مسیس جون برات حضرت بهاءاللّه پیش از نزول کتاب اقدس بحسب شریعت سابقه
subcodes.subjects: @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
